Notice Of Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds By Owners Of Interest
Off Calendar Dec-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sydney Fairbarn, Esq. (415-883-2199) for Claimant/Moving party LORETTA ELIZARDE
No other Appearance.

No Argument. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CLAIMANT LORETTA ELIZARDE's Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds By Owners Of Interest is GRANTED, claimants to receive $154,369 deposition with the Court, plus interest, if any. Claimants to prepare order. No opposition filed. No other claims on file. Order is signed in open court. (see scanned order for details)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds By Owners Of Interest
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Continued To Dec-02-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative rules as follows: CLAIMANT LORETTA ELIZARDE Notice Of Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds By Owners Of Interest is continued to December 2, 2016. Claimant is ordered to serve the Notice of the Hearing on All claimants identified in the trustee's declaration at the addresses specified therein. Such Notice to be served no later than October 27, 2016 specifying the new hearing date. Proof of service to be filed no later than October 28, 2016. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds By Owners Of Interest
Off Calendar Oct-13-2016 Continued To Oct-26-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivian Lerche, Esq. (415=650-5731) especially appearing for Claimant/Moving party LORETTA ELIZARDE.
No other Appearance.

Plaintiff Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CLAIMANT LORETTA ELIZARDE Notice Of Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds By Owners Of Interest is Continued to October 26,2016 for Claimant to provide courtsey copies of the claim to Department 501 no later than October 14, 2016. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing Of Statement Of Claim To Surplus Funds By Owners Of Interest Pursuant To California Code 2924j(D)
Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dave Marcolini (415-568-0742) specially appearing for Petitioner/Opposing party The Wolf Firm.
No other Appearance.

The Court informs Counsel there are no record of funds. Petitioner ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CLAIMANTS LORETTA ELIZARDE, JOJO ELIZARDE'S NOTICE OF STATEMENT OF CLAIM TO SURPLUS FUNDS BY OWNERS OF INTEREST PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CIVIL CODE 2924 J(D) is OFF CALENDAR, no funds have been deposited with this Court at this time. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
